title: sort containers and images by create time
body:
When running podman ps or podman images, the containers and images should
be sorted by newest to oldest.

Resolves: #830

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body:
o You probably want to update the examples on the manpage.
o It would be good to have a note somewhere in the man page listing the sort order used.
o Wish list, it would be nice to allow the user to sort that list by at least container-name via some --sort param.

The code as is LGTM
Lets get it by date first, and then --sort param later.
Sure thing on the sort param.  Not at all necessary for this PR, just wanted to throw it out there for future consideration.

:pushpin: Commit 1796cea has been approved by `mheon`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=mheon 1796cead8744ecb35d9896c3854009c087fe631e -->
:zap: Test exempted: pull fully rebased and already tested.
FYI, the podman ps man page really should be touched up....

@TomSweeneyRedHat I think our examples for `ps` are fine, since the original behavior was sorting like this - we regressed after swapping to boltdb.

Podman images probably does need a touchup though.
